expected_effect: Improve arb discipline without broad symmetric widening.
expected_failure_signature: The asymmetric overlay still cheapens both sides enough to leak arb and tail protection.
expected_win_condition: Charge only the toxic side while keeping the baseline spread intact.
hidden_coupling_removed: Symmetric baseline spread and toxic-side protection were sharing one additive surface.
rationale: Charge only the toxic side when trade direction and subsequent price extension agree, separating baseline spread from adverse-selection protection.
title: Side-specific markout memory
why_not_coefficient_retune: This adds side-specific markout memory and one-sided blockers instead of retuning symmetric carry terms.
